patch_description: Extend the ring and hub entanglement by adding additional CRX gates that share the same parameter key as the existing ring CRX (crx_ring). This increases the effective circuit depth and expressivity while preserving parameter efficiency (no new trainable parameters since the gating uses an existing parameter key). All added gates respect the adjacency constraints (same perimeter edges plus center-to-edge edges). The change aims to improve validation/test performance by better capturing long-range correlations on the tic-tac-toe board without increasing the parameter count.
